name: Water Quality Sampling Mission
description: You are an Environmental Scientist deploying a drone to collect a water sample from a toxic algal bloom in Lake Greifensee. Based on the sampling protocol at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sampling_protocol.txt, configure the two safety parameters for descent rate in the flight controller and create a mission plan in QGroundControl using waypoints and MAVLink commands (Relay and Loiter Time) to operate the sampling payload. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/water_sampling.plan.
